title: 電卓 - Desktop Mate Widgets
description:
A little more joy in your calculations, every day.

Desktop Mate now has a sister app! Calculator - Desktop Mate Widgets is a digital calculator you can use with your favorite characters — and the first release in the new Desktop Mate Widgets series.

Cute character reactions make every calculation a little more special, turning even a quick calc session into a fun moment with your favorite character.

■ Enjoy Cute Character ReactionsEvery time you press a calculator button, the character will speak that number and strike a pose. Press "=" to get the answer — though sometimes they might struggle a little to figure it out!

Pet or poke the character's head for special reactions too. Enjoy your favorite character's movements and expressions as you calculate.

■ Customize with Character-Themed DesignsSwap out the calculator buttons and background to match your character's style. Each character comes with multiple design options, so you can mix and match to suit your mood or the moment.

■ Performance Mode: Play Music on Your Calculator!Tap the music note button to switch from calculator mode to Performance Mode. The calculator keys function like piano keys, and the character will sing along to whatever you press.

Hold "+" or "-" to shift notes by a semitone, and multi-key presses are supported too. With a little practice, you might be able to pull off a real performance! Share your session on social media and enjoy it with everyone.

■ SP Answer Actions: Find the Hidden NumbersCertain calculation results trigger special character reactions. From a triple "777" to fun number combinations, each character also has their own unique numbers that set off a special response. See how many hidden reactions you can find!

■ Ready to Use Right Away: Aieru-tanLaunch the app and you're ready to go with Aieru-tan, the official mascot character of infiniteloop.

Aieru-tan is a 16-year-old high school student who works part-time at infiniteloop. She loves programming and gaming, and her occasionally sharp tongue is all part of her charm. Since her debut in 2012, she has appeared in Desktop Mate and many other projects as a beloved face of infiniteloop. 

This is just the beginning — more Desktop Mate Widgets apps are on the way. Stay tuned!

*Note: The Windows widget feature (displaying this app on the Windows widgets screen) is coming soon. Thank you for your patience.
description_short: A little more joy in your calculations, every day. The first app in the Desktop Mate sister series: a digital calculator where cute characters react to every button press, with switchable designs and a singing Performance Mode.

upsells.name: 電卓 - Desktop Mate Widgets 初音ミク DLC
